title: Python Scripting: Dates, Classes and Collections
description: This course is the second course in a series that aims to prepare you for a role working as a programmer. In this course, you will be introduced to the four main concepts in programming: Advanced String Operations and Dates, Modeling Classes, Development of Classes and Collections.  Labs will allow the students to apply the material in the lectures in simple computer programs designed to re-enforce the material in the lesson.
